name: When I Work
description: Employee scheduling and time clock platform.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to When I Work
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Generate or copy your API token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in When I Work → Settings → API Token. Contact support if not visible.

checks.name: When I Work App Availability
checks.description: Verifies When I Work API is accessible.
